pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 83, export_result.sh lines 9, 38
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 35 creates account with this name; task description confirms
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 53 creates account with this name; task description confirms
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 73 checks for this date; task description states 'October 15, 2024'
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 66 verifies this amount. Represents 2,500.00 EUR stored as cents (2500.00 * 100 = 250000). Task description confirms 'Amount sent: 2,500.00 EUR'
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 83 verifies this amount. Represents 2,725.00 USD stored as cents (2725.00 * 100 = 272500). Task description confirms 'Amount received: 2,725.00 USD'
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 36 sets currencyCode to 'EUR'; export_result.sh searches for EUR transactions
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 54 sets currencyCode to 'USD'; export_result.sh searches for USD transactions

privileged_info_summary: A cross-currency transfer task in Portfolio Performance with the following verified parameters: Transfer 2,500.00 EUR from 'Sparkasse Giro' account to 'Interactive Brokers' account (converting to 2,725.00 USD) on October 15, 2024. This represents an exchange rate of 1.09 USD/EUR (or ~0.917 EUR/USD), which is realistic for October 2024 (2024 average was 1.0822 USD/EUR with range 1.0350-1.1203). The portfolio file is synthetically generated at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/forex_portfolio.xml with initial EUR balance of 10,000.00. Both account types (Sparkasse Giro - German savings bank account, Interactive Brokers - US brokerage) are real financial institutions. Amounts are stored as integers representing cents/smallest currency unit.
